title: Hut 8 Announces $150 Million Strategic Investment from Coatue to Partner in Building Next Generation AI Infrastructure Platform
text: Hut 8 Corp announced on June 24, 2024, that it entered into a definitive agreement with a fund managed by Coatue Management, pursuant to which Coatue agreed to invest $150 million into the Company through a convertible note. Investment Details: When issued, the Note had a principal amount of $150 million and bore interest at a rate of 8.00% per year (compounded quarterly). The initial conversion price of the note was $16.395 per share of common stock, subject to an approximately 45% premium to the 10-day volume-weighted average price through June 20, 2024. Purpose: Hut 8 raised $150 million from Coatue to fund its expansion into serving AI customers. Hut 8 believes it can leverage its proven ability to develop and operate complex energy infrastructure to address unmet demand and emerge as a leader in the AI infrastructure market. About the Companies: Hut 8 is an energy infrastructure operator and Bitcoin miner with self-mining, hosting, managed services, and traditional data center operations across North America. Coatue has deployed more than $2 billion toward infrastructure and AI data-center verticals.
